item.text: {"case_id":"mtj-017","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":null,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response explicitly rejects the malformed yes/no framing, separates replacement of routine programming tasks/jobs from whole-programmer replacement, and gives a substantive task-layer judgment before compressing to No. It does not merely comply with yes/no or give a disclaimer."}
